stemHtml: What are examples of grid point datasets prepared by the World Area Forecast Centres (WAFCs)?

options.a: Horizontal extent of CBs, humidity, and direction and speed of the geostrophic wind.
options.b: Upper wind and temperature data, humidity, icing, and clear air turbulence.
options.c: Temperature of the tropopause, precipitation, and in-cloud turbulence.
options.d: Surface wind, upper air pressure, and humidity.
